mapper.select: SELECT id, question, answer, category, sort_order, is_published AS published, admin_id, view_count, link_url, link_label, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM faq WHERE is_published = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND embedding IS NULL

SELECT id, question, answer, category, sort_order, is_published AS published, admin_id, view_count, link_url, link_label, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM faq WHERE is_published = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, question, answer, category, sort_order, is_published AS published, admin_id, view_count, link_url, link_label, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM faq WHERE is_published = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND embedding IS NOT NULL
